task_description: Implement Product Design Bible phases 1.1 through 1.5: Vision/Brand Identity, Global Design System (typography, spacing, colors, radii, shadows), Glassmorphism/Motion Design (5 glass levels, spring easing, page transitions, scroll animations), Component Design Language (Lucide icons, Footer, Toast, CommandPalette), and Engineering/Accessibility/Performance (skip-to-content, focus indicators, WCAG 2.2 AA, responsive breakpoints).
